contract_claim: Parameter `plumbing_result` is declared in the signature of build_scorecard(config, analysis_results, junk_results=None, dead_code_results=None, plumbing_result=None) (signature at lines 106-113) as an accepted input that callers may pass.
observed_behavior: No call site ever passes `plumbing_result`: the only caller, run_audit in src/osoji/audit.py, invokes build_scorecard with config, analysis_results and junk_results only, so the parameter always takes its default None and the branches gated on it never execute.
